bio:
Unlike many other teachers on this teaching platform, I am a true teacher and have been a teacher for over 25 years in Taiwan, Japan and China. I will work extremely hard for you as a teacher including assigning homework extra curricular activities and anything else that you need I am a true professional and hope that you will choose me as your teacher not just your tutor. I am a TESOL/TEFL certified, 21 years of tutoring experience with students of all levels, all ages. My twenty one years of teaching experience comes from mostly Taiwan and also Japan. In my lessons, we will learn all about different subjects such as history,	geography and  science.  My younger students enjoy the humor and cartoons that I use in my classrooms and the oldest students can benefit from my years of experience. During my classes, you can tell me what areas that you would like to improve in the most.	 And we will discover and find out the best ways to do that. I truly can't wait to see you in my classroom. So what are you waiting for? рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҸ« Encourages students to speak up, integrating current events into lessons to improve comprehension and expression, and applying knowledge to exams
рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҸ« Teaching with a British English accent

рҹ“Қ Course structure

рҹҹҰ 10-Lesson Midterm Booster Course (50 minutes each)

Review common grammar and vocabulary for midterms using fill-in-the-blank and sentence-building exercises

Explain grammar usage and reading passages, then practice reading questions with the same grammar point

Midterm exam simulation to improve speed and confidence

рҹҹҰ 30-Lesson Exam Sprint Course (CAP)

Improve language sense and vocabulary: similar words, word roots, prefixes, and suffixes

Reading practice: build a structured SOP for answering questions

Sentence pattern variation: basic sentence patterns and common exam patterns (imperatives, active/passive, conditional sentences)

Tense comparison: compare similar tenses (e.g., past simple vs present perfect)

Sentence structure: adjective/adverb/noun clauses and other frequently tested structures

name: Jack
headline: Speaking - All ages - Writing
bio:
8+ years of English teaching
CELTA Certificate
Textbook-based and customized courses
Journalism background - 6 years writing for newspapers and magazines
Hundreds of satisfied, successful students around the world!

PERFECT FOR
рҹ”Ҙ Adults and teens
рҹ”Ҙ Hobby students - everyday English, shopping, ordering food, around town, pets, likes/dislikes, describing people and places, and more!
рҹ”Ҙ Professionals - interview, negotiation, marketing, sales, resumes, phone calls, email and more!
рҹ”Ҙ School students - grammar, spelling, punctuation, tenses, reading, writing, listening, speaking and more!

LET ME HELP YOU
Identify your needs - Why do you want to study English? How can it enrich your life?
Develop a course plan - Discuss goals and timeframe, as well as specific objectives.
Learn essential vocabulary and phrases - New vocabulary is the lifeblood of language. Learn new, practical vocabulary and phrases through textbooks, images and video.
Practice listening - Listen to a variety of audio material from native speakers, with activities to familiarize yourself with authentic spoken English.
Speak - Find yourself in role-play situations and use English for practical purposes. Have you ever checked into a hotel using English? Now is your chance!
Read and understand - Practice a variety of comprehension exercises based around materials such as maps, schedules, and travel brochures.
Become culturally aware - Learn norms, customs, and etiquette in English-speaking countries to navigate social interactions effectively.
Assess your progress - Regularly check your improvements to feel proud of your progress and stick to your goals.

TEACHING METHOD
вҳ‘пёҸ Objectives for every class
вҳ‘пёҸ Tried and trusted techniques: PRESENT new language, PRACTICE until comfortable, PRODUCE your own sentences!
вҳ‘пёҸ Materials based on the most successful English coursebooks, but customized for your needs
вҳ‘пёҸ Fun, engaging, and practical
вҳ‘пёҸ Multimedia approach - videos, pictures, songs and more!

WHO I AM
рҹҺү An English teacher based in Taiwan. 
рҹҺү Lived in 7 countries: UK, South Africa, Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Japan and Taiwan.
рҹҺү Worked as a journalist and in the hotel industry.
рҹҺү Interested in gym, gymnastics, MMA, tricking and playing the guitar!

name: Feds
headline: Become calm & confident today
bio:
вңЁ FIND YOUR VOICE, NOT JUST YOUR WORDS вңЁ

Calm Confidence. Clear Communication. Real Growth.

вҖңFeds has been a great coach all throughout the sessions. She gave me constructive feedback that helped me exponentially, not only with my leadership skills but also with my confidence. Her sessions are structured well and done professionally within the time frame. She gave me ample time to speak and express myself without feeling intimidated. She is straightforward and honest about the learning goals and how to achieve them.вҖқ
вҖ” Joanna, Client

рҹҢҝ Who I Am

IвҖҷm Feds вҖ” a Mindset and Neurolanguage CoachВ®, entrepreneur, and lifelong communicator.
For over 15 years IвҖҷve worked in fast-paced businesses across London and the USA, helping people express their ideas clearly, lead with confidence, and communicate without fear.
Communication isnвҖҷt just my job вҖ” itвҖҷs my life. IвҖҷve lived in five countries, learned new languages, built companies, and rebuilt my voice more than once. So I know exactly what it feels like to freeze, doubt yourself, or overthink every sentence вҖ” and how to move past it.

рҹ§  What I Do
I coach adults and professionals who want to:
гғ»Stay calm under pressure when speaking English
гғ»Build healthy, lasting habits for consistent progress
гғ»Shift their mindset from fear to flow
гғ»Develop clarity, presence, and confidence in communication
гғ»Reconnect with their authentic voice
гғ»YouвҖҷll learn to think clearly, speak confidently, and trust yourself вҖ” in English and in life.

рҹ’¬ My Coaching Programmes

рҹҷҸ Calm & Confident English Coaching
Your flagship journey from anxious speaker to calm communicator.
A 1:1 coaching programme that blends neuroscience, mindfulness, and practical communication.
YouвҖҷll master:
гғ»Emotional regulation while speaking
гғ»Grounding techniques for clear, calm expression
гғ»Language habits that reinforce confidence
гғ»Real-world speaking practice with structured reflection

Ideal for: adults, professionals, and anyone who wants to stop overthinking and start enjoying communication again.

рҹ§  Critical Thinking & Communication
Develop your ability to think in English, express ideas clearly, and speak with intellectual confidence.
Through real articles, debates, and cultural topics, youвҖҷll:
гғ»Sharpen your analysis and argumentation
гғ»Learn to express opinions with clarity and impact
гғ»Expand your vocabulary for real-life discussions
гғ»Build confidence to challenge ideas, not just repeat them

Ideal for: curious learners, future leaders, and anyone who loves big ideas.

рҹ’ј Business Communication & Career Coaching
For professionals navigating international or leadership roles.
We focus on clarity, confidence, and composure вҖ” in every situation.
YouвҖҷll learn how to:
гғ»Present yourself with calm authority
гғ»Communicate clearly in meetings and interviews
гғ»Build trust and rapport across cultures
гғ»Handle feedback, conflict, and pressure with grace

Ideal for: managers, entrepreneurs, and professionals aiming to grow or lead internationally.

рҹ”Ҙ Exam & Performance Support
This isnвҖҷt traditional exam prep вҖ” itвҖҷs mindset prep.
WeвҖҷll work on:
гғ»Calm focus before and during performance
гғ»Techniques to manage anxiety and overthinking
гғ»Visualisation and breathing strategies
гғ»Smart routines for mental clarity and self-belief

Ideal for: learners preparing for IELTS, job interviews, or any high-pressure moment.

рҹ’Һ My Style
гғ» Friendly but focused вҖ” youвҖҷll feel safe, seen, and challenged.
гғ» Direct вҖ” IвҖҷll always tell you what works and what doesnвҖҷt.
гғ» Practical вҖ” we work on your goals, not generic grammar.
гғ» Grounded in neuroscience, mindfulness, and positive psychology.
гғ» Real вҖ” because confidence isnвҖҷt taught, itвҖҷs built.

рҹҢҲ Who I Work With
гғ»Adults and professionals who feel anxious or stuck when speaking
гғ»Leaders who want to improve their communication presence
гғ»Career changers and entrepreneurs stepping into international roles
гғ»Learners who want to enjoy speaking English again

вқҢ Not the right fit if...
гғ»You just want grammar corrections
гғ»YouвҖҷre not ready to explore your mindset and habits
гғ»You prefer shortcuts over consistency
гғ»YouвҖҷre not open to reflection or feedback

рҹ“© Ready to Begin?

Tell me your goals.
IвҖҷll design a coaching plan tailored to your mindset, lifestyle, and ambitions вҖ” so you can speak with calm confidence and make English your second skin, not your second-guess.

рҹ‘үрҹҸј www.learnwithfeds.com
вңЁ Instagram & YouTube: @learnwithfeds

вңЁ Please note that the trial is to: 
1. Discuss your needs 
2. Set SMART goals 
3. Assess your current situation 
4. Show you templates of the material we will use 
5. Agree on what we will work on together and make a plan 

If you need anything else please send me a message before you book the trial to avoid disappointment 

рҹҳҠ Classroom rules: 
- If you need to cancel or move your class please do so 12 hours prior the beginning of the class. 
- If you are late for our class please let me know in advance. No shows will be reported and the class will be charged in full. 
- Use your computer, laptop or iPad. No smart phones, please. 
- Check your Internet connection is working smoothly. 
- No food allowed during class, but you're more than welcome to have a nice cup of tea or coffee/soft drink :)
